_comment: Whitelist of commands the agent may emit. Anything outside this list is rejected by the host app. The 'value' list for update_preference must stay in sync with the 'colors' category in phrases.json.

navigate.description: Navigate the user to a known screen.

update_preference.description: Update a single user preference to an approved color value.

no_action.description: No side effect. The response is just text.
